title: Fix portfolio and event photo image display (Image Not Found)

requirements.text: Fix the image rendering pipeline for portfolio photos so that images uploaded by organizers are correctly converted from the backend blob/Uint8Array format to a displayable base64 data URL or object URL in the PortfolioGallery and OrganizerCard components. The lightbox dialog must show the actual image instead of the 'Image Not Found' placeholder.
acceptanceCriteria: An organizer can upload a portfolio image and it appears correctly in the portfolio grid (no 'No Image' placeholder shown when an image exists).
Clicking a portfolio image opens the lightbox and displays the full-size image instead of 'Image Not Found'.
The image conversion logic correctly handles the Uint8Array/blob data returned from the backend actor and produces a valid src string (base64 data URL or blob object URL).
If an image genuinely has no data, the placeholder is shown as expected.

requirements.text: Fix the image rendering pipeline for event photos so that photos uploaded via EventPhotoUpload are correctly converted from the backend blob/Uint8Array format to a displayable base64 data URL or object URL in the EventPhotoGallery component and its lightbox dialog.
acceptanceCriteria: An organizer can upload an event photo and it appears correctly in the event photo gallery grid.
Clicking an event photo opens the lightbox and displays the full-size image correctly.
The same Uint8Array-to-URL conversion utility used for portfolio images is applied consistently to event photos.
Placeholder is only shown when no image data is present.

requirements.text: Audit and consolidate the image data conversion utility (Uint8Array/blob to base64 data URL or object URL) into a single shared helper function used by PortfolioGallery, PortfolioUpload, EventPhotoGallery, EventPhotoUpload, and OrganizerCard to ensure consistent and correct image rendering across all components.
acceptanceCriteria: A single utility function handles blob/Uint8Array-to-URL conversion.
All image-displaying components import and use this shared utility.
No component independently re-implements its own conversion logic.

constraints: Do not modify backend/main.mo data storage format — the fix must be entirely on the frontend image conversion layer.
Do not edit files listed in frontend.immutablePaths.
nonGoals: Changing the backend blob storage mechanism or data model.
Adding new image upload features or changing upload limits.
Redesigning the gallery or lightbox UI layout.
